chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلُ يُحِلُّ جَارِيَتَهُ لِأَخِيهِ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ تُحِلُّ جَارِيَتَهَا لِزَوْجِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – The man permits his slave girl to his brother, and the wife permits her slave girl for her husband

text: الرَّجُلِ يَقُولُ لِامْرَأَتِهِ أَحِلِّي لِي جَارِيَتَكِ فَإِنِّي أَكْرَهُ أَنْ تَرَانِي مُنْكَشِفاً فَتُحِلُّهَا لَهُ قَالَ لَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ مِنْهَا إِلَّا ذَاكَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَمَسَّهَا وَ لَا يَطَأَهَا وَ زَادَ فِيهِ هِشَامٌ أَ لَهُ أَنْ يَأْتِيَهَا قَالَ لَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ إِلَّا الَّذِي قَالَتْ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim, and Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who is saying to his wife, ‘Will you permit your slave girl for me, for I dislike it that she should see me uncovered?’ So she permitted her to him’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not Permissible for him, from her, except for that, and it is not for him that he touches her, nor sleeps with her’. And Hisham increased in it, ‘Is it for him that he sleeps with her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not Permissible for him except for that which she said’.
